# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a complete Azure web application stack (App Service, SQL Database, Storage Account). Focus on core resources and connectivity. We'll add diagnostic settings and monitoring in the next iteration after we verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

parameters:
  appName:
    type: string
  hostingPlanName:
    type: string
  sqlserverName:
    type: string
  databaseName:
    type: string
  location:
    type: string
resources:
- type: 'Microsoft.Web/sites'
  apiVersion: '2018-11-01'
  name: !Sub "${appName}"
  properties:
    serverFarmId: !Sub "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Web/serverfarms/${hostingPlanName}"
    httpsOnly: true
- type: 'Microsoft.Sql/servers'
  apiVersion: '2017-10-01-preview'
  name: !Sub "${sqlserverName}"
  location: !Ref location
  properties:
    administratorLogin: 'youradmin'
    fullyQualifiedDomainName: !Sub "${sqlserverName}.database.windows.net"
- type: 'Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts'
  apiVersion: '2018-07-01'
  name: !Sub "${appName}storacc"
  location: !Ref location
  properties:
    accessTier: 'Hot'
